task: Fetch Outlook free/busy availability for all consultant chunks, then update the local staffing dashboard data file.
codexInstructions: Use the Microsoft Outlook Calendar connector. The user must be authenticated in Codex/ChatGPT for the connector call.
Run every chunk in chunks sequentially in this single Codex task unless the user stops the run.
For each chunk, fetch free/busy calendar availability from request.start through request.end using request.timeZone.
After each chunk, merge the chunk into output.directConnectorEventsFile. Replace existing data for that chunk's emails, and preserve data for emails outside that chunk.
Use free/busy level data unless meeting subjects are explicitly available and safe to include.
When all chunks are complete, output.directConnectorEventsFile should contain the merged data for all refreshed consultants.
